function.name: make_decision
function.arguments: {"chosen_move": "defer", "action_id": "suppress_ttl", "prior_adjustment_log_odds": -0.3, "adjustment_reasons": ["Board overloaded at 20/10min — flood conditions (R-004)", "E1 with hand-set prior (n=0) — weak signal to act on", "Background-tagged radio transcript — likely low-significance chatter"], "novelty_flag": true, "confidence_p_real": 0.4, "what_would_change_my_mind": "If the radio transcript flag contained specific threat language (E2+ escalation), or if board load drops below threshold allowing proper investigation."}
